# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

# Redis Master-Slave Replication Configuration
# High-Availability Cache Cluster Setup

# ==========================================
# Master Node Configuration
# ==========================================
master:
  # Network settings
  bind: 0.0.0.0
  port: 6379
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General settings
  daemonize: "no"
  supervised: "no"
  pidfile: /var/run/redis/redis-master.pid
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: /var/log/redis/redis-master.log
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting (RDB persistence)
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: dump-master.rdb
  dir: /var/lib/redis/master

  # Replication - Master settings
  # No authentication required for slave connections (simplified setup)
  requirepass: ""
  masterauth: ""

  # Minimum number of slaves that must be connected for master to accept writes
  # Set to 0 so writes succeed even if all slaves are down
  min-slaves-to-write: 0
  # Maximum lag in seconds for a slave to be considered healthy
  min-slaves-max-lag: 10

  # Replication backlog settings
  repl-backlog-size: 1mb
  repl-backlog-ttl: 3600
  repl-diskless-sync: "no"
  repl-diskless-sync-delay: 5
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60

  # Memory management
  maxmemory: 2gb
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: appendonly-master.aof
  appendfsync: everysec
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: 64mb

  # Slow log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

  # Active defragmentation
  activedefrag: "yes"

# ==========================================
# Slave Node 1 Configuration
# ==========================================
slave1:
  # Network settings
  bind: 0.0.0.0
  port: 6380
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General settings
  daemonize: "no"
  supervised: "no"
  pidfile: /var/run/redis/redis-slave1.pid
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: /var/log/redis/redis-slave1.log
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting (RDB persistence)
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: dump-slave1.rdb
  dir: /var/lib/redis/slave1

  # Replication - Slave settings
  # Point to the master node
  slaveof:
    host: redis-master
    port: 6379

  # No authentication needed to connect to master
  masterauth: ""

  # Slave is read-only by default for data safety
  slave-read-only: "yes"

  # Serve stale data if master is unreachable
  slave-serve-stale-data: "yes"

  # Slave priority for sentinel failover (lower = higher priority)
  slave-priority: 100

  # Replication settings
  repl-diskless-load: disabled
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60

  # Memory management
  maxmemory: 2gb
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: appendonly-slave1.aof
  appendfsync: everysec
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: 64mb

  # Slow log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

# ==========================================
# Slave Node 2 Configuration
# ==========================================
slave2:
  # Network settings
  bind: 0.0.0.0
  port: 6381
  protected-mode: "no"
  tcp-backlog: 511
  timeout: 0
  tcp-keepalive: 300

  # General settings
  daemonize: "no"
  supervised: "no"
  pidfile: /var/run/redis/redis-slave2.pid
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: /var/log/redis/redis-slave2.log
  databases: 16

  # Snapshotting (RDB persistence)
  save:
    - seconds: 900
      changes: 1
    - seconds: 300
      changes: 10
    - seconds: 60
      changes: 10000
  stop-writes-on-bgsave-error: "yes"
  rdbcompression: "yes"
  rdbchecksum: "yes"
  dbfilename: dump-slave2.rdb
  dir: /var/lib/redis/slave2

  # Replication - Slave settings
  # Point to the master node
  slaveof:
    host: redis-master
    port: 6379

  # No authentication needed to connect to master
  masterauth: ""

  # Slave is read-only by default for data safety
  slave-read-only: "yes"

  # Serve stale data if master is unreachable
  slave-serve-stale-data: "yes"

  # Slave priority (higher value = lower priority for failover)
  slave-priority: 101

  # Replication settings
  repl-diskless-load: disabled
  repl-ping-slave-period: 10
  repl-timeout: 60

  # Memory management
  maxmemory: 2gb
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru
  maxmemory-samples: 5

  # Append Only File (AOF) persistence
  appendonly: "yes"
  appendfilename: appendonly-slave2.aof
  appendfsync: everysec
  no-appendfsync-on-rewrite: "no"
  auto-aof-rewrite-percentage: 100
  auto-aof-rewrite-min-size: 64mb

  # Slow log
  slowlog-log-slower-than: 10000
  slowlog-max-len: 128

# ==========================================
# Sentinel Configuration (for automatic failover)
# ==========================================
sentinel:
  port: 26379
  bind: 0.0.0.0

  # Monitor the master node
  # sentinel monitor <master-name> <ip> <port> <quorum>
  # quorum = number of sentinels that must agree master is down
  monitor:
    master-name: ha-cache-master
    host: redis-master
    port: 6379
    quorum: 2

  # Time in milliseconds before considering a master as down
  down-after-milliseconds: 5000

  # Timeout for failover operation
  failover-timeout: 60000

  # Number of slaves that can be reconfigured simultaneously during failover
  parallel-syncs: 1

  # No authentication for master
  auth-pass: ""

  # Sentinel log
  logfile: /var/log/redis/sentinel.log

# ==========================================
# Cluster Topology Summary
# ==========================================
# Master: redis-master:6379 (read/write)
# Slave1: redis-slave1:6380 (read-only replica)
# Slave2: redis-slave2:6381 (read-only replica)
# Sentinel: redis-sentinel:26379 (automatic failover)
#
# Key Configuration Notes:
#   - masterauth is empty (no authentication for slave connections)
#   - min-slaves-to-write: 0 (writes succeed even if all slaves are down)
#   - min-slaves-max-lag: 10 (slave lag threshold in seconds)
#   - slave-read-only: yes (prevents accidental writes to slaves)
#   - slave-serve-stale-data: yes (slaves respond even if replication is broken)
#   - AOF enabled on all nodes for durability
#   - LRU eviction policy for cache use case
